channels.description: Sends the current page title, headings, and bounded body text to the model.
channels.label: Current page context

channels.description: Searches the generated recipe index and attaches the most relevant docs, prompts, and remediation pages.
channels.label: SecurityRecipes search index

channels.description: Pulls bounded public or authenticated GitHub repo metadata, manifest files, open issues, and pull requests.
channels.label: GitHub repository context

channels.description: Checks public GitHub Dependency Graph SBOM packages against deps.dev advisory metadata.
channels.label: deps.dev advisory context

channels.description: Pulls bounded GitLab project metadata, useful repository files, open issues, and open merge requests directly in the browser for GitLab-centered remediation work.
channels.label: GitLab project context

channels.description: Pulls bounded Azure DevOps repository metadata, useful repo files, active pull requests, and recent open work items directly in the browser for remediation planning.
channels.label: Azure DevOps repository context

channels.description: Uploads a local SARIF 2.1.0 file in the browser, normalizes the findings, and attaches a bounded summary to prompts and agent runs.
channels.label: SARIF upload

channels.description: Uploads a local CycloneDX or SPDX JSON SBOM in the browser and attaches a bounded package, dependency, and vulnerability summary to prompts.
channels.label: SBOM upload

channels.description: Uploads major scanner and findings-platform JSON exports in the browser, normalizes them into a bounded summary, and feeds the exposure queue plus downstream reports without any server-side secret handling.
channels.label: Major scanner JSON exports

channels.description: Pre-populated browser-side config for pulling cloud and workload findings from Wiz when a customer enables direct API access.
channels.label: Wiz findings API

channels.description: Pulls a bounded first page of high-priority Snyk organization issues directly in the browser for scanner-aware triage and remediation planning.
channels.label: Snyk issues API

channels.description: Config profile for pulling ASFF findings into remediation reports and downstream workflow packs.
channels.label: AWS Security Hub

channels.description: Pulls a bounded Microsoft Defender XDR incident sample directly in the browser with local severity and status filters for queueing, reporting, and remediation planning.
channels.label: Microsoft Defender XDR incidents

channels.description: Pulls a bounded Microsoft Sentinel workspace incident sample directly in the browser with local severity and status filters for queueing, reporting, and remediation planning.
channels.label: Microsoft Sentinel incidents

channels.description: Pulls a bounded first page of GitLab project vulnerability findings directly in the browser when AppSec findings and fix ownership live in the same GitLab namespace.
channels.label: GitLab vulnerability findings

channels.description: Starter config for bounded CrowdStrike Falcon detection intake into browser-side triage and response workflows.
channels.label: CrowdStrike detections

channels.description: Starter config for exporting high-severity Tenable vulnerabilities into remediation and report workflows.
channels.label: Tenable vulnerability management

channels.description: Starter config for pulling active high-severity DefectDojo findings with enough context for analyst routing and ticket creation.
channels.label: DefectDojo findings

channels.description: Starter config for Prisma Cloud alert intake across posture and runtime findings.
channels.label: Prisma Cloud alerts

channels.description: Starter config for Security Command Center findings when cloud exposures need browser-side triage and routing.
channels.label: Google Cloud SCC findings

channels.description: Starter config for pulling open high-severity GitHub code scanning alerts into browser-side triage and remediation planning.
channels.label: GitHub code scanning alerts

channels.description: Starter config for bringing bounded Semgrep AppSec findings into browser-side reviewer queues and remediation handoffs.
channels.label: Semgrep AppSec findings

channels.description: Starter config for pulling open SonarQube vulnerabilities and security hotspots into a browser-local remediation queue.
channels.label: SonarQube security issues

channels.description: Starter config for pulling high-severity Checkmarx One findings into browser-side triage and routed handoff workflows.
channels.label: Checkmarx One findings

channels.description: Starter config for pulling actionable Veracode findings into a browser-local remediation and reporting workflow.
channels.label: Veracode findings

channels.description: Starter config for pulling Amazon Inspector findings into browser-side prioritization, reporting, and downstream routing.
channels.label: AWS Inspector findings

channels.description: Starter config for pulling high-risk Rapid7 InsightVM vulnerabilities into browser-side triage and routing workflows.
channels.label: Rapid7 InsightVM vulnerabilities

channels.description: Starter config for Orca alert intake when cloud exposure and workload findings need browser-side case and report handling.
channels.label: Orca Security alerts

channels.description: Starter config for pulling open high-severity Lacework alerts into browser-side remediation and escalation planning.
channels.label: Lacework alerts

channels.description: Searches Confluence Cloud pages in the browser to bring internal runbooks, exception notes, and operational context into a scoped agent session.
channels.label: Confluence runbook context
